title: GitBook Docs Site
description: A published documentation site in GitBook that serves content from one or more spaces under a configured hostname.

id.description: The unique identifier of the docs site.

title.description: The title of the docs site.

hostname.description: The hostname of the docs site.

urls.description: URLs associated with the docs site.

app.description: URL to the docs site in the GitBook app.

published.description: URL to the published docs site.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the docs site was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the docs site was last updated.
